# Vendored dependencies

`chart.umd.min.js` — [Chart.js](https://www.chartjs.org) v4.4.1, MIT License,
© Chart.js Contributors. Vendored locally (not loaded from a CDN) so the
dashboard works fully offline and makes no network requests. To update, run
`npm pack chart.js@<version>` and copy `package/dist/chart.umd*.js` here.
